notes: Three-document packet: (1) invoice from Meridian Supply Co., (2) certificate of liability insurance for Horizon Holdings LLC, (3) commercial general liability policy declarations page. Schema targets the COI (section 2). Correct behavior: extract Cornerstone Insurance as producer, Horizon Holdings as insured, Plano Corporate Park Management as certificate holder — all from the middle section. Today the extractor will likely pick up content from section 1 or section 3 depending on chunk routing. Tracks real-world use case: user uploads a packet with multiple document types and expects a specific one to be extracted. Waiting on oss-28 (classify + split pipeline stage) for a proper fix — this test will validate it lands correctly.
